source_coverage_summary.meaning: source inventory coverage only; not ecology demand coverage

supply_policy.canonical_row_semantics: one row = one imported capability card
supply_policy.direct_prototype_candidate_means: supply-side potential only; not a prototype row and not ecology evidence
supply_policy.source_of_truth_rule: I3 card = index; original artifact / closeout / runtime record = evidence source
